description:
Analyze TCP Stream 0 in the capture file '200722_tcp_anon.pcapng' (located in ~/Documents/captures/) to determine the negotiated TCP options and verify if packet sizes comply with the MSS. Identify the requested and accepted Maximum Segment Size (MSS) and Window Scale (shift count) from the 3-way handshake, the size of the largest TCP payload (tcp.len) transferred in the stream, and whether TCP Segmentation Offload (TSO) or Jumbo Frames are present. Save your findings to '/home/ga/Documents/captures/tcp_options_report.txt' using the following format:

Client_MSS: <value>
Server_MSS: <value>
Client_WScale: <value>
Server_WScale: <value>
Max_Payload_Size: <value>
TSO_Detected: <YES or NO>
